clusters.justification: These terms share co-activation profiles across the anterior insula, amygdala, and anterior cingulate cortex, which collectively process emotional valence, arousal, and internal mood states.
This cluster maps consistently onto mesolimbic and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry dedicated to computing subjective worth, reward prediction, and goal-directed utility.

Anchored by the default mode network, these terms reflect the internally-directed processing required to generate complex representations of the self, autobiographical narratives, and the internal states of others.
